allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('./db'\); const rows = db.prepare\('SELECT p.id, p.title, GROUP_CONCAT\(DISTINCT t.name\) AS tags FROM problems p LEFT JOIN problem_tags pt ON p.id = pt.problem_id LEFT JOIN tags t ON pt.tag_id = t.id GROUP BY p.id HAVING tags IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5'\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows, null, 2\)\);")
Bash(sqlite3 server/leetcode.db "SELECT t.name, COUNT\(pt.problem_id\) as cnt FROM tags t LEFT JOIN problem_tags pt ON t.id = pt.tag_id GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY cnt ASC LIMIT 20;")
Bash(sqlite3 server/leetcode.db "DELETE FROM tags WHERE id NOT IN \(SELECT DISTINCT tag_id FROM problem_tags\);")
